title: Helios: Real Real-Time Long Video Generation Model
insight: We introduce Helios, the first 14B video generation model that runs at 19.5 FPS on a single NVIDIA H100 GPU and supports minute-scale generation while matching the quality of a strong baseline. We make breakthroughs alon...

title: RealWonder: Real-Time Physical Action-Conditioned Video Generation
